title: Constraint
description: A single, evaluable condition that limits what is permitted. Constraint is more fundamental than Policy: a Policy is a collection of Constraints, a Control is an enforceable Constraint, Validation is the evaluation of a Constraint, and Eligibility, Approval Gates, Boundaries, Budgets, and Rate Limits are all specializations of Constraint.

kind.description: value | temporal | spatial | resource | rate | eligibility | approval | safety

expression.description: Declarative predicate over a target, e.g. 'amount <= budget.remaining'.

target.description: The Thing/attribute the constraint is evaluated against.

onViolation.description: Action when violated, e.g. deny, warn, require-approval, throttle.
